comments: Approved based on git show 6bdad51: the only implementation change is the dispatchPath string in src/mcp-server/src/index.ts changing ../../workflow/dispatch.json to ../../../workflow/dispatch.json. src/mcp-server/src/test-client.ts was not modified. No incidental changes were made to get_iteration_state or get_execution_diff. Additional changed files are limited to allowed artifacts: tasks/v0.5-m5-execution-result.json and tasks/v0.5-m5-result-review-packet.json.
